mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_translations ( id, place_id, locale, name, description, translation_source, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( COALESCE(#{id}, gen_random_uuid()), #{placeId}, #{locale,typeHandler=com.ds.goroute.config.database.TranslationLocaleTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{translationSource,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) ) ON CONFLICT (place_id, locale) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, description = EXCLUDED.description, translation_source = EXCLUDED.translation_source, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM place_translations WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY locale
